mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO attendance(id, staff_id, supposed_attendance_days, supposed_attendance_hours, actual_attendance_days, actual_attendance_hours, rest_days, absence_hours, absence_number, absence_times, appeal_times, late_minutes, late_times, early_minutes, early_times, sign_in_missing_times, sign_out_missing_times, business_travel_days, field_work_hours, normal_hour, weekend_hour, statutory_hour, normal_to_rest_hour, weekend_to_rest_hour, statutory_to_rest_hour, normal_to_salary_hour, weekend_to_salary_hour, statutory_to_salary_hour, workday_delay_hours, day_off_delay_hours, holiday_delay_hours, deep_night_duration, annual_leave, personal_leave, breastfeeding_leave, compensated_leave, mourning_leave, full_pay_sick_leave, paid_sick_leave, paternity_leave, home_leave, marriage_leave, maternity_leave, other_vacation, prenatal_checkup, remark, update_date, create_time, update_time) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.staffId}, #{item.supposedAttendanceDays}, #{item.supposedAttendanceHours}, #{item.actualAttendanceDays}, #{item.actualAttendanceHours}, #{item.restDays}, #{item.absenceHours}, #{item.absenceNumber}, #{item.absenceTimes}, #{item.appealTimes}, #{item.lateMinutes}, #{item.lateTimes}, #{item.earlyMinutes}, #{item.earlyTimes}, #{item.signInMissingTimes}, #{item.signOutMissingTimes}, #{item.businessTravelDays}, #{item.fieldWorkHours}, #{item.normalHour}, #{item.weekendHour}, #{item.statutoryHour}, #{item.normalToRestHour}, #{item.weekendToRestHour}, #{item.statutoryToRestHour}, #{item.normalToSalaryHour}, #{item.weekendToSalaryHour}, #{item.statutoryToSalaryHour}, #{item.workdayDelayHours}, #{item.dayOffDelayHours}, #{item.holidayDelayHours}, #{item.deepNightDuration}, #{item.annualLeave}, #{item.personalLeave}, #{item.breastfeedingLeave}, #{item.compensatedLeave}, #{item.mourningLeave}, #{item.fullPaySickLeave}, #{item.paidSickLeave}, #{item.paternityLeave}, #{item.homeLeave}, #{item.marriageLeave}, #{item.maternityLeave}, #{item.otherVacation}, #{item.prenatalCheckup}, #{item.remark}, #{item.updateDate}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
